title: Bulb
description: A plugin created to speed up the work when creating new mini-games for plugins.
body: Bulb is focused on streamlining the work when creating new minigames, allowing developers to forget about the basics, allowing them to focus on the mechanics and making the game fun! **What does it do?** - Automatically handles the necessary creation of mini-game instances to always have one available. - Automatic management of the game flow. - Quickly set up new maps for mini-games. - An integrated scoreboard system for quick use within mini-games. Check the wiki to learn how to use it in your plugins. [Click here](https://julion-n.gitbook.io/bulb/)
